concepts: Mobile application development for iOS and Android
Working with device features (camera, storage, sensors)

soft_skills: Willingness to learn new mobile technologies
Attention to detail in user experience
Time management and ability to meet deadlines
responsibilities: Develop and maintain mobile applications for iOS and Android
Implement user interfaces using native or cross-platform frameworks
Integrate mobile apps with backend APIs
Debug and fix issues across different devices and screen sizes
Write clean, maintainable, and well-structured code
Collaborate with designers and developers to deliver features
Test applications to ensure usability and performance
Use Git for version control and team collaboration
Continuously learn and improve mobile development skills
